# Shared Contracts â€” READ FIRST (all agents)

Every workspace app imports schema/types from `packages/db` and `packages/shared`.
**Do not modify files outside your assigned directory.** Do not edit this file,
`packages/*`, or any `appplan/*.md` plan file.

## Binding names (use EXACTLY these in wrangler.jsonc and code)

| Binding | Type | Used by |
|---|---|---|
| `DB` | D1 database `ai-video-db` | all workers |
| `KV` | KV namespace | api, admin |
| `ASSETS_BUCKET` | R2 bucket `assets` | api, pipeline, render |
| `RENDERS_BUCKET` | R2 bucket `renders` | api, render |
| `UPLOADS_BUCKET` | R2 bucket `uploads` | api |
| `RENDER_QUEUE` | Queue `render-queue` (producer in api, consumer in render) | api, render |
| `RENDER_JOB_DO` | Durable Object `RenderJobDO` (defined in apps/render) | api (via service binding), render |
| `RENDERER` | Container class `RendererContainer` (apps/render) | render |
| `GENERATION_PIPELINE` | Workflow `GenerationPipeline` (apps/pipeline) | api, pipeline |
| `REGEN_IMAGE` | Workflow `RegenerateSceneImage` | api, pipeline |
| `REGEN_VOICE` | Workflow `RegenerateVoiceover` | api, pipeline |
| `RENDER_SERVICE` | Service binding api â†’ render worker (for DO access) | api |

Secrets (via `wrangler secret`): `OPENAI_API_KEY`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`,
`REPLICATE_API_TOKEN`, `FCM_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON`, `EMAIL_API_KEY`,
`BETTER_AUTH_SECRET`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET`.

Env vars: `AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL` (Cloudflare AI Gateway URL prefix), `APP_BASE_URL`.

## Database

Schema lives ONLY in `packages/db/src/schema.js` (drizzle-orm/sqlite-core).
Import as `import * as schema from "@app/db/schema"` with
`drizzle(env.DB, { schema })` from `drizzle-orm/d1`. Never define tables locally.

Token deduction MUST use `db.batch([...])`: check balance row, conditional
update `tokens = tokens - ?  WHERE tokens >= ?`, insert token_transactions row;
treat 0 affected rows as insufficient balance.

## Shared types

`packages/shared/src/index.ts` exports zod schemas + TS types:
`ProjectComposition`, `Scene`, `CaptionConfig`, `RenderRequest`,
`RenderProgressMessage`, `GenerationParams`, `TokenAction`, API DTOs.
All cross-worker payloads (queue messages, workflow params, DO messages,
HTTP bodies) MUST use these types.

## Queue message (render-queue)

```ts
{ jobId: string, projectId: string, userId: string, resolution: "720p"|"1080p" }
```

## RenderJobDO HTTP interface (apps/render owns it)

- `POST /init` `{jobId, projectId, userId}` â€” create state
- `POST /progress` `{progress: number, status: string, error?, videoUrl?}` â€” renderer/consumer updates
- `GET /status` â€” `{jobId, status, progress, videoUrl?, error?}`
- `GET /ws` â€” WebSocket upgrade, pushes status JSON on every update

## API surface (apps/api owns all public routes)

Base `/api/v1`. Auth: better-auth Bearer tokens; `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
Routes per plan Â§6: auth (better-auth handler at `/api/auth/*`), projects CRUD +
`POST /projects/:id/generate` + `GET /projects/:id/generation-status` +
`PATCH /projects/:id/composition`, render (`POST /projects/:id/render`,
`GET /render-jobs/:id`, `GET /render-jobs/:id/ws` proxied to DO),
tokens (balance/history/cost-estimate/purchase-verify), templates (GET, KV cached),
brands CRUD, notifications (list/mark-read), devices (register FCM token),
assets (presigned upload/download).

Standard response envelope: success `{ data }`, error
`{ error: { code: string, message: string } }` with proper HTTP status.

## Conventions

- TypeScript everywhere, `compatibility_date: "2026-01-10"`, `nodejs_compat` flag.
- Hono for routing in api/admin. zod validation on every body.
- IDs: nanoid via `nanoid`. Timestamps: unix ms integers.
- Each app has its own `wrangler.jsonc`, `package.json` (workspace deps:
  `"@app/db": "workspace:*"`, `"@app/shared": "workspace:*"`), `README.md`
  with deploy steps, and `npm run typecheck` passing (`tsc --noEmit`).
